items.title: UserDefaults in Swift

There is another way to store a small set of data, UserDefaults.

items.title: UISwitch Value Change Listener : Swift

items.title: Switch Statement in Swift
items.summary: The switch statement in Swift is used to execute a particular block of code based on multiple conditions. A switch statement is useful for more than one condition. For one or two conditions, if-else is a better option but for conditions more than that, a switch statement is a better option.

items.title: Kotlin Range Operator
items.summary: Range Operator in Kotlin is a basic operator that is used to operate over a range. A range can be defined with a start value and an end value with and without inclusion.
